---
title: "WTX_processing_plus_cellchat"
author: "Katherine Simpson"
date: "2026-06-02"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(AUCell)
library(harmony)
library(sctransform)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(CellChat)


options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2*3)
```

```{r}
seu.list <- lapply(seurat_paths, readRDS)
```

## QC filter
```{r}
# Add qcCellsPassed metadata column
seu.list <- lapply(seu.list, function(seu) {
  seu$qcCellsPassed <- seu$nFeature_RNA >= 200 & 
                       seu$nCount_RNA >= 400 & 
                       seu$nCount_RNA <= 11000 & 
                       seu$nFeature_RNA <= 7000 & 
                       seu$Area <= 30000
  return(seu)
})

# Filter to only cells that passed QC
new_seurats_clean <- lapply(seu.list, function(seu) {
  subset(seu, subset = qcCellsPassed == TRUE)
})

```

```{r}
names(seu.list) <- basename(seurat_paths)  
names(new_seurats_clean) <- names(seu.list)

qc_summary <- data.frame(
  sample = names(seu.list),
  total_cells_original = sapply(seu.list, ncol),
  total_cells_filtered = sapply(new_seurats_clean, ncol)
)

qc_summary$percent_filtered <- round(
  (1 - qc_summary$total_cells_filtered / qc_summary$total_cells_original) * 100, 2
)

qc_summary

write.csv(qc_summary, file = "qc_filtering_summary_newsamples.csv")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

plot_qc_metrics <- function(seu, sample_name) {
  df <- seu@meta.data
  df$sample <- sample_name
  
  p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sample, y = nFeature_RNA)) +
    geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(200, 7000), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title = "nFeature_RNA", x = "", y = "nFeature_RNA") +
    theme_classic()
  
  p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sample, y = nCount_RNA)) +
    geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(400, 11000), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title = "nCount_RNA", x = "", y = "nCount_RNA") +
    theme_classic()
  
  p3 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sample, y = Area)) +
    geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 30000, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title = "Area", x = "", y = "Area") +
    theme_classic()
  
  (p1 | p2 | p3) 
}

qc_plots <- mapply(plot_qc_metrics, seu.list, names(seu.list), SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

lapply(qc_plots, print)

pdf("qc_metrics_before_filtering_newsamples.pdf", width = 12, height = 4)
lapply(qc_plots, print)
dev.off()

```

## Add in metadata for FOVs belonging to each sample
```{r}
flows_meta = read.csv("flows_meta.csv")

seurat_names <- names(new_seurats_clean)

# Fix leading/trailing whitespace in flows_meta sample names
flows_meta$sample <- trimws(flows_meta$sample)

# Re-derive fov_min and fov_max
flows_meta <- flows_meta %>%
  mutate(
    FOV = ifelse(grepl("Jan", FOV), gsub("Jan-", "1-", FOV), FOV),
    fov_min = as.numeric(sub("-.*", "", FOV)),
    fov_max = as.numeric(sub(".*-", "", FOV))
  )

# Check
flows_meta %>% filter(sample %in% c("AGS21-16129", "AGS15-6075", "WPS19-02322", "AGS19-04330", "AGS17-18785", "AGS20-03666")) %>%
  select(sample, FOV, fov_min, fov_max)


#match seurats to samples
new_seurats_clean <- lapply(seurat_names, function(sname) {
  seu <- new_seurats_clean[[sname]]
  
  # Find rows in flows_meta where the sample name appears in the seurat object name
  meta_subset <- flows_meta %>%
    filter(sapply(sample, function(s) grepl(gsub("-", ".", s), sname)))
  
  message("Sample: ", sname, " -> matched ", nrow(meta_subset), " rows in flows_meta")
  
  seu$sample <- "Unknown"
  for(i in 1:nrow(meta_subset)) {
    seu$sample[seu$fov >= meta_subset$fov_min[i] & 
               seu$fov <= meta_subset$fov_max[i]] <- meta_subset$sample[i]
  }
  
  return(seu)
})
names(new_seurats_clean) <- seurat_names

# Check
lapply(new_seurats_clean, function(seu) table(seu$sample))

lapply(new_seurats_clean, function(seu) {
  seu@meta.data %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    summarise(
      fov_min = min(fov),
      fov_max = max(fov),
      unique_fovs = n_distinct(fov)
    )
}) %>% bind_rows()

```

```{r}
saveRDS(new_seurats_clean, file = "new_seurats_postQC.rds")
```

## Remove MT genes, Apply SCTransform, Merge Seurats, Harmony

```{r}
# Load both lists
seurats_clean <- readRDS("seurats_postQC.rds")
new_seurats_clean <- readRDS("new_seurats_postQC.rds")

# Combine into one list
all_seurats <- c(seurats_clean, new_seurats_clean)

# Strip images
all_seurats <- lapply(all_seurats, function(seu) {
  seu@images <- list()
  return(seu)
})

saveRDS(all_seurats, file = "all_seurats.rds")

# Load both lists
all_seurats <- readRDS("all_seurats.rds")

# Add percent.mt, percent.rb, remove MT genes, SCTransform
all_seurats <- lapply(all_seurats, function(seu) {
  
  if(!"percent.mt" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data)) {
    seu[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^MT-", assay = "RNA")
  }
  if(!"percent.rb" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data)) {
    seu[["percent.rb"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^RP[SL]", assay = "RNA")
  }
  
  # Remove MT genes
  non_mt_genes <- rownames(seu)[!grepl("^MT-", rownames(seu))]
  seu <- seu[non_mt_genes, ]
  
  # SCTransform
  seu <- SCTransform(seu, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE)
  
  return(seu)
})

# Merge
merged_seurat <- merge(x = all_seurats[[1]], 
                       y = all_seurats[2:length(all_seurats)], 
                       add.cell.ids = names(all_seurats),
                       merge.data = TRUE)

# Select variable features and run PCA
features <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = all_seurats, nfeatures = 3000)
VariableFeatures(merged_seurat) <- features

merged_seurat <- RunPCA(merged_seurat, verbose = FALSE)
merged_seurat <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30)

saveRDS(merged_seurat, file = "merged_seurat_combined.rds")

# Run Harmony integrating by sample
harmonized_seurat <- RunHarmony(merged_seurat, "sample")
harmonized_seurat <- RunUMAP(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)

saveRDS(harmonized_seurat, file = "harmonized_seurat_combined.rds")
```


```{r}
rm(seu.list, new_seurats_clean)
```


```{r}
merged_seurat = readRDS("merged_seurat_combined.rds")
```


```{r}
harmonized_seurat = readRDS("harmonized_seurat_combined.rds")
```

#Pre-harmony visualizations
```{r}
# Visualize PCA to see batch effects
merged_seurat <- FindNeighbors(merged_seurat, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30)
merged_seurat <- FindClusters(merged_seurat, resolution = 0.2)

p1 = DimPlot(merged_seurat, reduction = "pca", group.by = "sample", 
              pt.size = 0.5) + ggtitle("PCA before Harmony")
print(p1)

# Elbow plot to determine number of PCs
p2 = ElbowPlot(merged_seurat, ndims = 50)
print(p2)


p3 = DimPlot(merged_seurat, reduction = "umap", group.by = "sample", 
              pt.size = 0.5) + ggtitle("UMAP before Harmony - by Sample") + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
p4 = DimPlot(merged_seurat, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
              pt.size = 0.5, label = TRUE) + ggtitle("Clusters before Harmony") + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
print(p3)
print(p4)
```

#Post Harmony visualization
```{r}
harmonized_seurat <- FindNeighbors(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
harmonized_seurat <- FindClusters(harmonized_seurat, resolution = 0.2)


p6 = DimPlot(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "pca", group.by = "sample", 
              pt.size = 0.5) + ggtitle("PCA before Harmony") 
p7 = DimPlot(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "harmony", group.by = "sample", 
              pt.size = 0.5) + ggtitle("Harmony embeddings")
p8 = DimPlot(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "umap", group.by = "sample", 
              pt.size = 0.5
              ) + ggtitle("UMAP after Harmony - by Sample") + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
p9 = DimPlot(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
              pt.size = 0.5,
               label = TRUE) + ggtitle("Clusters after Harmony") + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

print(p6)
print(p7)
print(p8)
print(p9)
```

```{r}
png("umap_before_harmony_all.png", width = 800, height = 600)
print(p3)
dev.off()

png("clusters_before_harmony_all.png", width = 800, height = 600)
print(p4)
dev.off()

png("umap_after_harmony_all.png", width = 800, height = 600)
print(p8)
dev.off()

png("clusters_after_harmony_all.png", width = 800, height = 600)
print(p9)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
pdf("umap_before_harmony_all.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(p3)
dev.off()

pdf("clusters_before_harmony_all.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(p4)
dev.off()

pdf("umap_after_harmony_all.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(p8)
dev.off()

pdf("clusters_after_harmony_all.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(p9)
dev.off()
```

## Post-Harmony Clusters

```{r}
# Run FindNeighbors 
harmonized_seurat <- FindNeighbors(harmonized_seurat, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)

# Define resolutions to test
resolutions <- c(0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5)

# Run FindClusters for all resolutions at once
# Seurat stores each as "RNA_snn_res.X" in metadata
harmonized_seurat <- FindClusters(harmonized_seurat, resolution = resolutions)

# Plot a UMAP for each resolution
plots <- lapply(resolutions, function(res) {
  col_name <- paste0("SCT_snn_res.", res)
  n_clusters <- length(unique(harmonized_seurat@meta.data[[col_name]]))
  
  DimPlot(
    harmonized_seurat,
    group.by  = col_name,
    reduction = "umap",
    label     = TRUE,
    repel     = TRUE
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Resolution: ", res, "  |  Clusters: ", n_clusters)) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
})

# Arrange in a grid (2 columns)
wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2)

```

## Assign Cell Type Names

```{r}
# ── 0. Make res 0.2 clusters the active identity ──────────────────────
Idents(harmonized_seurat) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.2"
harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters <- harmonized_seurat$SCT_snn_res.0.2

# ── Flag trash cells in metadata only  ────────────────────────
harmonized_seurat$keep <- !harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters %in% c("11", "18")
table(harmonized_seurat$keep)  # confirm how many cells are being dropped

# ── Get barcodes to keep ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cells_keep <- colnames(harmonized_seurat)[harmonized_seurat$keep]
cat("Keeping", length(cells_keep), "cells\n")

# ──  subset ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
harmonized_seurat <- harmonized_seurat[, cells_keep]

# ── 2. Get SPP1 counts for cluster 5 cells ────────────────────────────────────
spp1_counts <- GetAssayData(harmonized_seurat, layer = "counts")["SPP1", ]

# ── 3. Label cluster 5 cells as SPP1+ or SPP1- ────────────────────────────────
harmonized_seurat$cluster_SPP1 <- ifelse(
  harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters == "5",
  ifelse(spp1_counts > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
  NA
)
table(harmonized_seurat$cluster_SPP1, useNA = "ifany")

# ── 4. Define cell type labels ────────────────────────────────────────────────
cluster_labels <- c(
  "0"  = "Lymphocytes",
  "1"  = "Epithelial",
  "2"  = "Fibroblasts",
  "3"  = "Plasma",
  "4"  = "Epithelial",
  "5"  = NA,              # handled via SPP1 split
  "6"  = "Plasma",
  "7"  = "Endothelial",
  "8"  = "Plasma",
  "9"  = "Plasma",
  "10" = "Mast_cells",
  "12" = "Fibroblasts",
  "13" = "Fibroblasts",
  "14" = "Epithelial",
  "15" = "Epithelial",
  "16" = "Epithelial",
  "17" = "Plasma"
)

# ── 5. Build cluster_for_cellchat ─────────────────────────────────────────────
harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat <- ifelse(
  harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters == "5",
  paste0("Macrophage_SPP1_", harmonized_seurat$cluster_SPP1),
  cluster_labels[as.character(harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters)]
)

# ── 6. Sanity checks ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Distribution of final labels
table(harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat, useNA = "ifany")

# Confirm trash clusters are gone
stopifnot(!any(harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters %in% c("11", "18")))

# Confirm no unexpected NAs (only Macrophage NAs should be resolved by SPP1 split)
stopifnot(!any(is.na(harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat)))

# ── 7. UMAP of final labels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
DimPlot(harmonized_seurat, group.by = "cluster_for_cellchat",
        reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("Clusters for CellChat") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```



## Dot Plot + Marker Table: Top 5 DEGs per Cluster
```{r}
clusters <- sort(unique(harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters))
message(sprintf("Clusters found: %s", paste(clusters, collapse = ", ")))

message("Running FindAllMarkers...")
markers_all <- FindAllMarkers(
  harmonized_seurat,
  assay            = "RNA",
  only.pos         = TRUE,
  min.pct          = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold  = 0.25,
  test.use         = "wilcox"
)
```

```{r}
# ── Filter + Top 5 per cluster ────────────────────────────

markers_sig <- markers_all %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))

top5 <- markers_sig %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup()

# Ordered gene list — grouped by cluster
genes_ordered <- top5 %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(cluster))) %>%
  pull(gene) %>%
  unique()

message(sprintf("Genes in dot plot: %d", length(genes_ordered)))

# ── 4. Dot Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────

# Order clusters numerically on Y axis
Idents(harmonized_seurat) <- factor(
  harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters,
  levels = rev(sort(unique(harmonized_seurat$seurat_clusters)))
)

p <- DotPlot(
  harmonized_seurat,
  features  = genes_ordered,
  assay     = "RNA",
  cols      = c("lightgrey", "#B2182B"),
  dot.scale = 6,
  scale     = TRUE
) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5,
                                 size = 7, face = "italic"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Top 5 DEGs per Seurat Cluster",
    subtitle = "Log-normalized, z-scored | Wilcoxon, padj < 0.05",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Cluster"
  ) +
  # Dashed vertical lines separating each cluster's genes
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = seq(5, length(genes_ordered) - 1, by = 5) + 0.5,
    linetype   = "dashed",
    colour     = "grey60",
    linewidth  = 0.35
  )

# Dynamic width based on number of genes
plot_width <- max(12, length(genes_ordered) * 0.22 + 4)

ggsave("dotplot_clusters.pdf",
       plot = p, width = plot_width, height = 7, units = "in")

ggsave("dotplot_clusters.png",
       plot = p, width = plot_width, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)

message("✓ Saved: dotplot_clusters.pdf / .png")

# ── 5. Marker Table ───────────────────────────────────────────

# Clean, formatted table of top 5 markers per cluster
marker_table <- top5 %>%
  select(
    Cluster      = cluster,
    Gene         = gene,
    Log2FC       = avg_log2FC,
    Pct_Expr_Cluster = pct.1,
    Pct_Expr_Other   = pct.2,
    Adj_Pvalue   = p_val_adj
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Log2FC     = round(Log2FC, 3),
    Adj_Pvalue = formatC(Adj_Pvalue, format = "e", digits = 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(Cluster)), desc(Log2FC))

# Save as CSV
write.csv(marker_table, "cluster_marker_table_top5.csv", row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(markers_sig, "cluster_markers_all_sig.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print summary to console
message("\n── Top 5 Markers per Cluster ──────────────────────────")
for (cl in sort(unique(marker_table$Cluster))) {
  cat(sprintf("\nCluster %s:\n", cl))
  sub <- marker_table %>% filter(Cluster == cl)
  print(as.data.frame(sub), row.names = FALSE)
}
```


## Macrophage SPP1+ vs SPP1- Comparison

```{r}
# -- 1. Subset to the two macrophage populations -------------------------------
mac_cells <- subset(
  harmonized_seurat,
  subset = cluster_for_cellchat %in% c("Macrophage_SPP1_Negative",
                                       "Macrophage_SPP1_Positive")
)
Idents(mac_cells) <- "cluster_for_cellchat"

DefaultAssay(mac_cells) <- "SCT"

# -- 2. dot plot: curated inflammatory markers --------------------------
markers <- c("TIMP1", "MMP12", "MMP9", "IL1B", "IL1RN",
             "SPP1", "CD300E", "TREM1", "S100A12")

p1_final <- DotPlot(
  object    = mac_cells,
  features  = markers,
  group.by  = "cluster_for_cellchat",
  assay     = "SCT",
  cols      = c("lightgrey", "#B2182B"),
  dot.scale = 12                        # larger dots
) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_size(range = c(0, 12), limits = c(0, 100)) +  # size key goes to 100
  labs(
    title  = "Macrophage SPP1+ vs SPP1-",
    x      = NULL,
    y      = NULL,
    size   = "% Expressed",
    colour = "Avg Scaled Expr"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(p1_final)

ggsave(
  "Macrophage_SPP1_dotplot_final.pdf",
  plot   = p1_final,
  width  = 6,
  height = 7,
  units  = "in"
)
```



## CellChat

```{r}
#---#
## read counts matrix
#---#

# Extract SCT data matrix for each sample and rename cells
data.input_list <- list()
for(s in unique(harmonized_seurat$sample)){
  cells <- WhichCells(harmonized_seurat, expression = sample == s)
  mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(harmonized_seurat, slot = "data", assay = "SCT")[, cells]
  colnames(mat) <- paste0(s, "_", colnames(mat))
  data.input_list[[s]] <- mat
}

# Responders
data.input.responder <- cbind(
  data.input_list[["AGS18-05009"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS19-13043"]],
  data.input_list[["WPS17-15624"]],
  data.input_list[["WPS19-04204"]],
  
  data.input_list[["AGS21-16129"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS15-6075"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS19-04330"]],
  data.input_list[["WPS19-02322"]]
)

# Non-responders
data.input.non_responder <- cbind(
  data.input_list[["AGS18-00413"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS19-14722"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS20-09037"]],
  data.input_list[["SVS21-12350"]],
  
  data.input_list[["AGS17-11762"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS22-00104"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS17-18785"]],
  data.input_list[["AGS20-03666"]]
)


#---#
## generate metadata
#---#

# Build metadata list per sample
meta.input_list <- list()
for(s in unique(harmonized_seurat$sample)){
  cells <- WhichCells(harmonized_seurat, expression = sample == s)
  meta.input_list[[s]] <- data.frame(
    labels  = harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat[cells],
    samples = s,
    row.names = paste0(s, "_", cells)  # matches renamed barcodes from step 1
  )
}

# Combine by condition
meta.responder <- rbind(
  meta.input_list[["AGS18-05009"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS19-13043"]],
  meta.input_list[["WPS17-15624"]],
  meta.input_list[["WPS19-04204"]],
  
  meta.input_list[["AGS21-16129"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS15-6075"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS19-04330"]],
  meta.input_list[["WPS19-02322"]]
)

meta.non_responder <- rbind(
  meta.input_list[["AGS18-00413"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS19-14722"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS20-09037"]],
  meta.input_list[["SVS21-12350"]],
  
  meta.input_list[["AGS17-11762"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS22-00104"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS17-18785"]],
  meta.input_list[["AGS20-03666"]]
)

# Set rownames to match renamed cell barcodes from data.input objects
rownames(meta.responder)     <- colnames(data.input.responder)
rownames(meta.non_responder) <- colnames(data.input.non_responder)

# Check your cell type names to fill in the levels below
print(unique(harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat))

# Extract cell type levels directly from the data
celltypes <- sort(unique(harmonized_seurat$cluster_for_cellchat))

meta.responder$labels    <- factor(meta.responder$labels,    levels = celltypes)
meta.non_responder$labels <- factor(meta.non_responder$labels, levels = celltypes)

# Factor samples
meta.responder$samples <- factor(meta.responder$samples,
                                 levels = c("AGS18-05009","AGS19-13043","WPS17-15624","WPS19-04204",
                                            "AGS21-16129","AGS15-6075","AGS19-04330","WPS19-02322"))
meta.non_responder$samples <- factor(meta.non_responder$samples,
                                     levels = c("AGS18-00413","AGS19-14722","AGS20-09037","SVS21-12350",
                                                "AGS17-11762","AGS22-00104","AGS17-18785","AGS20-03666"))
#---#
## the coordinates matrix
#---#

# Extract coordinates per sample
coordinates.input_list <- list()
for(s in unique(harmonized_seurat$sample)){
  cells <- WhichCells(harmonized_seurat, expression = sample == s)
  df <- harmonized_seurat@meta.data[cells, c("x_slide_mm", "y_slide_mm")]
  rownames(df) <- paste0(s, "_", rownames(df))  # match renamed barcodes
  coordinates.input_list[[s]] <- df
}

# Combine by condition
spatial.locs.responder <- rbind(
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS18-05009"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS19-13043"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["WPS17-15624"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["WPS19-04204"]],
  
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS21-16129"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS15-6075"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS19-04330"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["WPS19-02322"]]
)

spatial.locs.non_responder <- rbind(
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS18-00413"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS19-14722"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS20-09037"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["SVS21-12350"]],
  
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS17-11762"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS22-00104"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS17-18785"]],
  coordinates.input_list[["AGS20-03666"]]
)

# Set rownames to match expression matrices
rownames(spatial.locs.responder)    <- colnames(data.input.responder)
rownames(spatial.locs.non_responder) <- colnames(data.input.non_responder)

# Turn into matrix
spatial.locs.responder    <- as.matrix(spatial.locs.responder)
spatial.locs.non_responder <- as.matrix(spatial.locs.non_responder)

#---#
## create the coordinates scale factor dataframe
#---#
conversion.factor = 1
spatial.factors = data.frame(ratio = conversion.factor, tol = 0.0015/2)

# One row per sample — replicate to match number of samples
spatial.factors <- do.call(rbind, replicate(length(unique(harmonized_seurat$sample)),
                                             spatial.factors, simplify = FALSE))
rownames(spatial.factors) <- unique(harmonized_seurat$sample)


#---#
## create the final cellchat objects
#---#
cellchat_responder <- createCellChat(
  object          = data.input.responder,
  meta            = meta.responder,
  group.by        = "labels",
  datatype        = "spatial",
  coordinates     = spatial.locs.responder,
  spatial.factors = spatial.factors[1:8, ]  # 8 responder samples
)

cellchat_non_responder <- createCellChat(
  object          = data.input.non_responder,
  meta            = meta.non_responder,
  group.by        = "labels",
  datatype        = "spatial",
  coordinates     = spatial.locs.non_responder,
  spatial.factors = spatial.factors[1:8, ]  # 8 non-responder samples
)

saveRDS(cellchat_responder, file = "cellchat_responder_allsamples.rds")
saveRDS(cellchat_non_responder, file = "cellchat_non_responder_allsamples.rds")

#---#
## run cellchat
#---#

# Set database
CellChatDB <- CellChatDB.human
CellChatDB.use <- subsetDB(CellChatDB, search = "Secreted Signaling", key = "annotation")
cellchat_responder@DB <- CellChatDB.use
cellchat_non_responder@DB <- CellChatDB.use

# Process each object
object.list <- list(R = cellchat_responder, NR = cellchat_non_responder)
for (i in 1:2) {
  object.list[[i]] <- subsetData(object.list[[i]])
  object.list[[i]] <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(object.list[[i]])
  object.list[[i]] <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(object.list[[i]])
  object.list[[i]] <- computeCommunProb(object.list[[i]], type = "truncatedMean", trim = 0.1,
                                        distance.use = FALSE, interaction.range = 250, scale.distance = NULL,
                                        contact.dependent = TRUE, contact.range = 100)
  object.list[[i]] <- filterCommunication(object.list[[i]], min.cells = 10)
  object.list[[i]] <- computeCommunProbPathway(object.list[[i]])
  object.list[[i]] <- aggregateNet(object.list[[i]])
}
object.list[[1]] <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(object.list[[1]], slot.name = "netP")
object.list[[2]] <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(object.list[[2]], slot.name = "netP")
cellchat <- mergeCellChat(object.list, add.names = names(object.list))

saveRDS(object.list, "cellchat_object_list_allsamples.rds")
saveRDS(cellchat, "cellchat_merged_allsamples.rds")

# Signaling role scatter plots  - R
png("signaling_role_R_8.png", width = 800, height = 600)
netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(object.list[["R"]]) + ggtitle("Signaling Roles - R")
dev.off()

#Signaling role scatter plots - NR
png("signaling_role_NR_8.png", width = 800, height = 600)
netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(object.list[["NR"]]) + ggtitle("Signaling Roles - NR")
dev.off()
```
